auditors.finding: The first audit found a real risk: non-success onboarding banners were amber/red, but the outer action panel could remain green from payload.status=ok.
auditors.disposition: fixed by making onboard_account panel color inherit onboardingResultModel.visual and by adding tests for outer panel color

auditors.finding: The second audit confirmed non-success onboarding states no longer keep a green outer action panel, selected backend ids are hidden on non-success, no browser file/path intake exists, and scope stayed inside web UI/test files.
auditors.disposition: accepted after additional invalid_json result.status hardening

evidence: index.html onboarding modal contains buttons/text only
overview.js boundedUiActionPayload copies only allowed string keys
onboard_account is invoked without extra browser payload

green_success_gate.evidence: onboardingResultModel requires ui_state=success, reserve success outcome, reserve_first_proven=true, selected_backend_id, pool_after_onboarding=reserve, active_routing_changed=false, validate_outcome=ok, and status_observed.command_status=ok

selected_backend_hidden_on_non_success.evidence: selectedBackendId is raw only when the full success predicate is true; otherwise '-'

actual_invalid_json_catch_path.evidence: onboardingResultModel now reads payload.status || payload.result.status, so result.status=invalid_json also renders red

no_active_routing_or_auto_promote_succes.evidence: success copy says reserve and active routing unchanged; follow-up actions are separate operator actions

visual_metrics.evidence: after_metrics.json has 1600x1000 captures with inputs=0, fileInputs=0, visibleSvgIcons=0, and overflows=[] for all captured states
